channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1082] add mds-survey to lustre-tests
item.description: Add mds-survey into lustre tests suite to make sure the new changes will not break it.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-1082 test: create test for mds-survey (Revision a562648d49aca59a8f9af5c77a149a9fe69353e4)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : a562648d49aca59a8f9af5c77a149a9fe69353e4
Files :

  • lustre/tests/Makefile.am
  • lustre-iokit/mds-survey/mds-survey
  • lustre/tests/sanity.sh
  • lustre/tests/mds-survey.sh
  • lustre-iokit/obdfilter-survey/libecho
